description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a rounded body and a slightly flared rim. The cup features a prominent handle attached to one side, allowing for easy gripping. On the exterior, there is a large, handwritten-style black text that reads 'Nat' with a heart symbol beneath it, giving the cup a personalized and playful appearance. The surface is smooth and has a matte to slightly glossy finish, with no visible chips or cracks. The interior is plain and clean, matching the exterior's white color. The cup is of standard size, suitable for holding beverages such as coffee or tea.
description: A white ceramic cup with a handle and handwritten black text 'Nat' with a heart, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy surface.
description_view_0: The cup is seen from an angle showing the handle on the right and part of the black text on the left side.
description_view_1: The back of the cup is visible, showing the handle directly in the center and no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The cup is viewed from the opposite side of the handle, with the handle on the left and a partial view of the black text on the right.
description_view_3: The front of the cup is shown, displaying the full 'Nat' text and heart symbol prominently.
